name: Lua Expression
description: This algorithm allows you to define an arbitrary CV or audio process by simply entering a line of text on the module, for example a + b to add two signals together. It is designed to catch those little corner cases where stringing together, say, a bunch of attenuverters would be tedious, and writing a full blown Lua script seems like overkill (or, if you're out and about without a computer on which to write the script).
gui_description: The display shows any errors encountered when parsing or running the expression, or No errors if everything is OK.

parameters.name: Input A-H
parameters.description: The bus to use for the correspondingly named expression variable.

parameters.name: Input A-H mode
parameters.description: Whether the input is interpreted as a voltage (a floating point number in the expression) or a logic input (a boolean value in the expression).

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.

parameters.name: Rate
parameters.description: Whether the expression is evaluated at control rate or audio rate.

input_ports.name: Input A
input_ports.description: Input signal A for expression evaluation

input_ports.description: Input signal B for expression evaluation

input_ports.description: Input signal C for expression evaluation

input_ports.description: Input signal D for expression evaluation
